decision_rationale: No prior art reaches kw>=2 / sem>=0.7 / func>=0.7; max scores 0.30-0.32. Combined bakks fixed-utterance dictionary + tama lead-query + polyrhythmic K-agent concurrent + Wolof P_lex constraint + ask-respond bind appears novel composition. NOTE: primary scored 8 hits at sem 0.78-0.92 / func 0.76-0.92 on multi-agent protocol + speech-act adjacencies; verdict-level disagreement flagged.
